content.full_text:
January 9, 2004

Linda M. Balok
Steefel, Levitt & Weiss
One Embarcadero Center, 30th Floor
San Francisco, CA 94111-3719

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-296

Dear Ms. Balok:

This correspondence is written notification that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your December 16, 2003, request on behalf of Esther Blau, Director of the Marin Healthcare District, for written advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act. As Director Blau submitted her own request for advice on January 2, 2004, you have subsequently requested that your letter be withdrawn.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Galena West
Counsel, Legal Division
